settings.title: The Premier Event for AEC Project Managers

settings.editor:
AEC PM Connect is a unique event designed to bring together AEC project managers, equipping them with the tools and strategies they need to successfully manage and deliver projects within their organizations.

Founded in 2024 by Anthony Fasano, P.E., AEC PM, and the Engineering Management Institute, the next AEC PM Connect will take place on October 27-28, 2025, in Kansas City.

It is clear that success in the AEC industry depends on effective project management. Without strong PM strategies, firms cannot grow sustainably. That’s why AEC PM Connect offers two tailored learning tracks:

icon_list.text: Project Management Track – Focused on best practices for managing projects efficiently.
PM Development Track – Designed for those responsible for training and developing project managers.

settings.editor: Topics covered will include:

PM Track

  • Earned Value Management (EVM)
  • Project Resourcing
  • PM Role Play with REAL Scenarios
  • Risk Management
  • Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Project Management

PM Development Track

  • PM Career Paths + Progression
  • Building a PM Culture
  • Hiring & Onboarding PMs 
  • PM Tools, Templates + Software
  • How to Build and Run a PMO

Below is an overview of the agenda.

CLICK HERE for a flyer.
Session Descriptions

AEC PM Connect is the leading event dedicated to project management in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry.

Our 2025 program will be our best yet, featuring the latest industry trends, real-world data, and actionable case studies to help you enhance how you manage projects, lead teams, and drive success within your organization.

This event was designed to accelerate PM development by learning from the experiences of other project managers and organizations—and applying those insights immediately!

Don’t miss this opportunity to connect, learn, and elevate your project management skills - and those within your organization!
Tuesday, October, 28th 2025

What makes AEC PM Connect different?

AEC PM Connect stands out because it is designed to foster genuine connections among AEC Project Managers, enabling them to learn from one another. More than just an event, it is a true community. It is also the only event in the AEC industry that offers dedicated learning tracks for both project managers and those responsible for their development.

By attending AEC PM Connect, you will gain valuable, proven strategies actively used by other organizations—insights you can implement to drive meaningful change in your own.

Is AEC PM Connect just for PM professionals?

Not at all! While our first event focused solely on project managers, we’ve since expanded to include dedicated learning tracks for both project managers and those responsible for their development.

In the PM track, we’ll cover essential topics like scope creep, risk management, and the practical application of earned value. Meanwhile, the PM Development track will explore areas such as career path progression, PM tools and software, PMOs, and strategies for building a strong project management culture.

We are actively coordinating speakers and offering opportunities for topic-specific experts, panelists, and facilitators. If you're interested in speaking at AEC PM Connect Kansas City, please complete THIS FORM.

slides.content: AEC PM Connect gave us direct access to project managers and business leaders, helping us understand their challenges and support their success.
slides.name: Luke Carter
slides.title: Sponsor

slides.content: "AEC PM Connect provided a unique opportunity to gain real industry insights, understand the challenges project managers and firm leaders face, and be part of the problem-solving process. It’s an invaluable event for anyone looking to support and develop project managers."
slides.name: Colin George
slides.title: Sponsor

slides.content: "[I enjoyed making] connections, just getting to meet other local leaders and managers at construction companies that maybe we deal with directly or indirectly. It's always good to network with them and kind of share our experiences and see where the overlaps are."
slides.name: Paul Tierney
slides.title: Speaker

slides.content: "I love the Connections that I'm making here at the conference with the other attendees and the other presenters. It's always nice to see how other firms manage their projects and their people."
slides.name: Tori Colombatto
slides.title: Speaker

slides.content: "My experience was fantastic. I really enjoyed getting to hear the presenters, in particular Lindsay Madsen, who's with Gannett Fleming TranSystems, and seeing how she's tracking projects and resources across the enterprise."
slides.name: Michelle Kratzer, P.E., PTOE
slides.title: Audience

slides.content: "I would definitely encourage individuals... to participate in this event because it really allows them to broaden your networks, learn different skills that will help them to be successful, and then also turn around and encourage other people in their PM journey."
slides.name: Kingsley Kantanka, P.E
slides.title: Audience

settings.editor:
We hope you're excited to visit Kansas 2025 AEC PM Connect!

The AEC PM Connect event will take place at the offices of Keen Wealth Advisors Offices located at 7500 College Blvd # 1000, Overland Park, KS 66210.

There are a number of accommodations in the area.

*Marriott Kansas City Overland Park is the closest option, just a few minutes walk.*
Marriott Kansas City Overland Park

Marriott Kansas City Overland Park is a newly renovated hotel located in the heart of Overland Park, Kansas. The hotel offers redesigned accommodations featuring all king beds, a unique feature in the area. Guests can enjoy amenities such as Zephyr Kitchen & Bourbon Bar, a full-service Starbucks, an expanded fitness center equipped with Peloton bikes, and both indoor and seasonal outdoor pools. The hotel's central location provides easy access to shopping, dining, the Overland Park Convention Center, and various local attractions. Additionally, the hotel is pet-friendly, welcoming guests traveling with their furry companions.

Room Rate: $169 per night (As of February 2025)

*Please Note: this is not a room block, this is only a suggestion made from the AEC PM Connect team.

We encourage you to make your room reservations as soon as possible to ensure the best rate possible.
Partner with AEC PM Connect to Grow Your Influence

AEC PM Connect provides partners with a valuable opportunity to strengthen their brand, grow their network, and connect with a highly skilled audience of AEC project management professionals. 

This opportunity for sponsors is different from most industry events in that the AEC PM Connect audience is very engaged and there are many opportunities for real conversations. Sponsorship offers exceptional visibility, meaningful connections, and a platform to establish thought leadership in AEC project management. It’s an ideal way to show your dedication to the industry while showcasing your expertise and innovative approaches to project management.
